overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a lush overgrown wetland area with massive curved holographic walls displaying sky imagery. The character walks through shallow water and dense blue flower fields before stopping to observe the scale of the futuristic digital structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown wetland with scattered ruins and holographic walls

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow water and grass toward the dense flower field and massive curved wall ahead

entered.detail: tall palm trees scattered throughout the overgrown area
shallow reflective water covering parts of the ground
ancient stone structures covered in vines and vegetation
massive curved digital wall displaying pink and orange sunset sky imagery
patches of small blue flowers growing among the grass
small purple glowing object visible in the distance near the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy walking through a lush wetland environment with palm trees and shallow water. Ancient stone ruins covered in vines line the left side while a massive curved holographic wall dominates the distant center, displaying warm sunset imagery. Small patches of blue flowers are scattered across the grassy terrain as the character approaches the flower field.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense blue flower field approaching holographic wall

events.description: terrain transitions from scattered flowers to dense carpet of blue flowers

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the dense field of blue flowers toward the glowing purple object and the base of the massive wall

entered.detail: thick carpet of small blue flowers covering the ground completely

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a dense carpet of blue flowers that covers the ground completely. The massive holographic wall grows larger in the frame, shifting from a distant backdrop to a dominant presence. The glowing purple crystal becomes more prominent ahead on the right as the character approaches the base of the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: base of massive holographic display wall

events.description: character stops walking and stands still to observe the wall
holographic wall display shifts from warm pink-orange to cool blue tones as the camera pans left

agents.ego_description: standing still at the base of the wall, looking up and around to take in the scale of the massive curved structure

segments.scene_description: The character comes to a stop at the base of the massive holographic wall, which now fills the view with its curved surface. The camera pans slowly to the left, revealing how the wall's display shifts from warm sunset colors to cool blue tones. The dense blue flowers remain visible in the foreground while the character looks up at the towering digital structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush wetland that transitions from a wide natural landscape into an intimate encounter with a towering digital structure. It begins with Aloy walking past vine-covered stone ruins and palm trees in shallow water, moving toward a distant, curved holographic wall displaying a warm sunset. As the character advances, the terrain shifts into a dense carpet of blue flowers that completely covers the ground, while a glowing purple crystal emerges on the right. The scene then culminates as the character reaches the base of the massive wall, which expands to dominate the entire frame. Finally, the camera pans slowly to the left, revealing the holographic display shifting from warm sunset hues to cool blue tones above the field of flowers.
